mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment ( payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, amount, channel, status, transaction_id, provider_trade_no, provider_payload, paid_at ) VALUES ( #{paymentNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{transactionId}, #{providerTradeNo}, #{providerPayload}, #{paidAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, amount, channel, status, transaction_id, provider_trade_no, provider_payload, paid_at, created_at, updated_at FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'SUCCESS'

SELECT id, payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, amount, channel, status, transaction_id, provider_trade_no, provider_payload, paid_at, created_at, updated_at FROM payment WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET status = 'SUCCESS', provider_trade_no = #{providerTradeNo}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo} AND status != 'SUCCESS'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_callback_log ( channel, payment_no, order_no, provider_trade_no, event_type, raw_body, headers, signature_valid, handled, failure_reason ) VALUES ( #{channel}, #{paymentNo}, #{orderNo}, #{providerTradeNo}, #{eventType}, #{rawBody}, #{headers}, #{signatureValid}, #{handled}, #{failureReason} )
